settings.text:
This soft bristle scalp massage brush is specially designed for curly hair. The gentle, flexible bristles massage the scalp effectively, helping to improve blood circulation and promote healthier hair roots. It easily detangles curls without causing pain or breakage while enhancing natural curl definition and reducing frizz. When used during shampooing, it deeply cleanses the scalp, removes product buildup, and provides a relaxing, spa-like experience.

9.06fl oz (Pack of 1)

settings.benefit_1_text: Soft bristles detangle curly hair without pulling, pain, or breakage.
settings.benefit_2_text: Improves blood circulation for a healthier scalp and stronger roots.
settings.benefit_3_text: Enhances natural curl definition and controls frizz.
settings.benefit_4_text: Lightweight, ergonomic design ideal for daily use and shampooing.

settings.question_2: WHEN CAN I EXPECT TO SEE RESULTS
settings.answer_2: Most users notice a cleaner, healthier-feeling scalp right away. Fuller-looking, stronger hair typically appears within 4–8 weeks of regular use. Consistency is key.
settings.answer_3:
Stimulates the scalp to activate healthier hair growth

Rosemary extract boosts circulation around the follicles, encouraging stronger, fuller growth from the root.


Rebuilds weak, damaged strands with hydrolyzed keratin

Keratin peptides penetrate deeply to reinforce the hair shaft, reducing breakage and helping your hair grow longer without snapping.


Restores scalp balance for optimal growth conditions

Gently cleanses excess oil, product buildup, and dryness that can slow down healthy growth cycles.


Lightweight formula cleans effectively without stripping

Delivers nutrients without heaviness—leaving hair clean, soft, and ready to grow.


Strengthens hair to support long-term growth retention

With continued use, strands stay stronger, smoother, and more resilient, helping you finally keep the length you gain.

settings.review_text: This product went above and beyond what I expected. The build and performance are top-tier, and you can feel the quality right away. I’d absolutely recommend it to anyone considering it.

settings.paragraph_text:
Experience soothing scalp care and healthier hair with the Soft Bristle Scalp Massage Brush. Designed for all hair types, especially curly and textured hair, this easy-to-use brush gently massages the scalp to stimulate blood circulation and support stronger, healthier hair growth. The soft, flexible bristles glide smoothly through hair, helping to detangle knots, reduce frizz, and evenly distribute natural oils from root to tip.

Perfect for use during shampooing or dry brushing, this scalp brush helps remove buildup, cleanse the scalp more effectively, and create a relaxing, spa-like experience at home. Lightweight, ergonomic, and gentle enough for daily use, it’s the ideal tool for maintaining a balanced scalp and beautifully defined, manageable hair.

settings.heading: Soft Bristle Scalp Massage Brush — Gentle Care for Healthy Hair

Whether you’re using it at home, at work, or while traveling, it is built to support long-term use and deliver lasting value, making it a practical and dependable choice over time.

settings.heading_accent: Product Features – Gentle Care for Your Scalp & Hair

Its ergonomic, easy-to-hold design ensures comfortable use without pulling or irritation, making it suitable for all hair types.

settings.answer: Yes, it is crafted using durable materials to ensure long-lasting performance and reliability with proper care.

settings.answer: Yes, this product is designed for regular use and is made with high-quality, safe materials. When used as directed, it provides a comfortable and reliable experience.

settings.answer: Results may vary depending on usage and individual needs. However, many users notice improvements with consistent and regular use over time.

settings.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, returns, and more.

settings.title: Rosemary extract / essential oil
settings.text: Used to stimulate scalp circulation and support hair follicles, which may help with hair growth.

settings.title: Amino-acid based cleansing system
settings.text: Rather than harsh sulfates; this gentler formula helps cleanse while minimizing scalp irritation and dryness.

settings.title: hydrolyzed keratin
settings.text: A protein meant to strengthen hair and reduce breakage.

settings.title: Biotin
settings.text: A customer-favorite hair vitamin known to support stronger strands from the root. It helps boost keratin production, reduce breakage, and promote thicker, fuller-looking hair over time.

settings.heading:
Key Ingredients

Powered by clinically proven growth-supporting ingredients that boost scalp circulation, strengthen weak strands, and deliver lasting hydration for fuller, healthier-looking hair.

settings.title: Growth & Circulation
settings.description: Rosemary helps boost scalp circulation, creating a healthier foundation for fuller, stronger-looking hair.

settings.title: Hydrolyzed Keratin = Repair & Strength
settings.description: Damaged keratin makes hair weak and thin. This formula uses hydrolyzed keratin to bind to the hair shaft, helping reduce breakage, smooth split ends, and strengthen strands—so hair looks thicker and stronger.

settings.title: Targets Hair Loss From Two Angles
settings.description: Most shampoos only cleanse. This one cleans the scalp, nourishes the roots, and strengthens hair—leading to less fallout and more growth potential.

settings.title: Who is this perfect for?
settings.description:
Thinning hair

Breakage & split ends

Excess shedding

Dry, weak strands

Heat or color damage
